message:
refactor(budget): consolidate budget evaluation test suite

Simplify budget test suite by consolidating low-level unit tests for
internal helpers (aggregate_metrics, MetricWindow edge cases,
BudgetTracker multi-zone tracking) into focused integration-style
assertions. Core budget logic and enforcement remain unchanged.

- Use HashMap::with_capacity() for performance optimization
- Replace complex multi-step to_error test with direct snapshot-based test
- Remove redundant edge-case test coverage for internal MetricWindow
  rolling behavior (tested implicitly through higher-level scenarios)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
